strategy: Pack Myth, Life, or Death attacks. He takes bonus incoming damage from all three, and never hit into his 80% Balance resist.
Expect a Conscripted Mander at the end of Round 1 and another at the end of Round 2. He refuses to stay outnumbered and replaces any Mander that dies, so don't try to clear them all.
Don't set Traps on Steffan. Each Trap makes him cast a Weakness on you. Rely on Blades, or protect a trap with Indemnity.
Watch for Sandstorm plus a Black Mantle on the first Wizard, which cuts accuracy. Carry a Cleanse Charm or accuracy enchant so your finisher doesn't fizzle.
Blade up over 2-3 rounds, then burst his 5120 health with one big Myth, Life, or Death hit. Chipping just lets him sacrifice Manders for 500 health each and heal the difference back.
cheatNotes: Expect a Conscripted Mander on the enemy side at the end of Round 1.
A second Mander arrives at the end of Round 2, and he replaces any Mander you kill, so don't try to grind them down.
Every time you hit him he eats a Mander for 500 health. Burst him in one big hit instead of chipping, or he heals the difference back.
Don't trap him. Each Trap you place earns you a Weakness. Rely on Blades, or protect a trap with Indemnity.
He can interrupt-cast Mana Burn to drain your pips. Hit soon after you build pips rather than sitting on a full bar.
Sandstorm plus a Black Mantle lands on one Wizard and cuts accuracy. Keep a Cleanse Charm or accuracy enchant ready so your hit lands.
The Black Mantle targets the first Wizard in the lineup, so put your least accuracy-dependent character in that slot.
